name: Chicken in Lime
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Brown the chicken in oil.
3. Push the chicken to one side of the pan.
4. Saute onion and garlic until fragrant.
5. Add cumin, coriander, turmeric, and soy sauce.
6. Cook, covered, stirring frequently for about 20 minutes.
- Add water as needed to maintain moisture.
7. Sprinkle with lime juice just before serving.
